findings.title: langchain4j/langchain4j
findings.description: LangChain4j is an open-source Java library that simplifies the integration of LLMs into Java applications through a unified API, providing access to popular LLMs and vector databases. It makes implementing RAG, tool calling (including support for MCP), and agents easy. LangChain4j integrates seamlessly with various enterprise Java frameworks.

findings.title: aipotheosis-labs/aci
findings.description: ACI.dev is the open source tool-calling platform that hooks up 600+ tools into any agentic IDE or custom AI agent through direct function calling or a unified MCP server. The birthplace of VibeOps.

findings.title: Chen-zexi/open-ptc-agent
findings.description: An open source implementation of code execution with MCP (Programatic Tool Calling)

findings.title: Reason-Wang/ToolGen
findings.description: [ICLR 2025] The official implementation of paper "ToolGen: Unified Tool Retrieval and Calling via Generation"

findings.title: OoriData/Toolio
findings.description: GenAI & agent toolkit for Apple Silicon Mac, implementing JSON schema-steered structured output (3SO) and tool-calling in Python. For more on 3SO: https://huggingface.co/blog/ucheog/llm-power-steering

findings.title: j66n/acte
findings.description: A framework to build GUI-like Agent Tools, enhancement to Function Calling of LLM AI.

findings.title: Oct4Pie/toolbridge
findings.description: Enable tool/function calling for any LLM, in OpenAI and Ollama API formats, adding universal function calling to models without native support. Use local or cloud models with full agent capabilities.

findings.title: TheUncharted/zapcode
findings.description: TypeScript interpreter for AI agents. Written in Rust. 2µs cold start. Sandboxed. Alternative to MCP tool calling.

findings.title: dleerdefi/peak-ai-agent-stack
findings.description: RinAI agentic chat stack. Includes graphRAG memory, parallel tool calling, DeepSeek R1 powered web search, advanced LLM gateway and active context summarization.

findings.title: agenticloops-ai/agentic-ai-engineering
findings.description: Hands-on tutorials for building AI agents from scratch. Learn LLM APIs, prompt engineering, tool calling, and the agent loop through practical examples.

findings.title: Maximilian-Winter/ToolAgents
findings.description: ToolAgents is a lightweight and flexible framework for creating function-calling agents with various language models and APIs.

findings.title: kennethleungty/Wikipedia-Scraping-with-LLM-Agents
findings.description: Scraping Wikipedia by combining LangChain's agents and tools with OpenAI's LLMs and function calling

findings.title: MiXaiLL76/n8n-nodes-sgr-tool-calling
findings.description: Hybrid Schema-Guided Reasoning (SGR) has agentic system design created by neuraldeep community

findings.title: neuledge/graph
findings.description: ⚡️ Real-time Knowledge Graph for AI Agents. Connect LLMs to verified weather, stock, and currency data via instant tool-calling. No API keys, no scrapers, just grounded facts in <100ms.

findings.title: HaxxorCialtion/SimpleTool
findings.description: A method to use LLM function calling with real-time level speed, empowering latency-sensitive applications like robotics, game AI, and autonomous agents.

findings.title: vanvuongngo/ClaraN
findings.description: ClaraN — Privacy-first, fully local AI workspace with Ollama LLM chat, tool calling, agent builder, Stable Diffusion, and embedded n8n-style automation. Backend in Rust. Just your stack, your machines.

findings.title: Szesnasty/ai-protector
findings.description: Ship AI agents with guardrails — not prayers. Self-hosted runtime protection for LLMs and tool-calling agents: block prompt injection, enforce tool permissions, redact sensitive data, and control what agents are allowed to do.

findings.title: Ryota-Kawamura/Functions-Tools-and-Agents-with-LangChain
findings.description: You’ll explore new advancements like ChatGPT’s function calling capability, and build a conversational agent using a new syntax called LangChain Expression Language (LCEL) for tasks like tagging, extraction, tool selection, and routing.

findings.title: MiiFlow/miiflow-agent
findings.description: Lightweight Python SDK for LLMs with unified API across 9 providers. Built-in ReAct & Plan-Execute agents, streaming,   native tool calling, context injection, structured outputs, and observability.

findings.title: woojubb/robota
findings.description: TypeScript framework for building AI agents — multi-provider (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google), tool calling, permissions, hooks, streaming, and CLI coding assistant
